title: Background & CV
bio:
I'm a marine biology student at the University of Exeter (Penryn), starting my master's this year. My interests span rocky-shore ecology, marine invertebrates and coastal conservation.

When I'm not in a lab or lecture, you'll usually find me on the Cornish coast — rock-pooling, surveying, or photographing whatever the tide brings in.

Replace this text in the admin panel with your own story, background and what you're hoping to do next.
glance:
🎓 Starting an **MSc in Marine Biology** at Exeter (Penryn)

📍 Based in Penryn, Cornwall

🔬 Interested in coastal ecology & conservation

🦀 Fond of crabs
